name: Boomcestors
short_description: Boomcestors is a top-down arena shooter game with rogue-lite elements, where players command a squad of up to six soldiers, battling various enemies in the medieval era using modern weaponry, artillery, and air support.
detailed_description:
Are you prepared to crush medieval armies, reduce their defensive structures to rubble, and dominate sprawling battlefields, all with cutting-edge modern warfare technology at your fingertips?

Your squad is a lethal machine, armed with today’s weapons. Customize your squad’s size and composition, determine who will join your deadly ranks, and choose which weapons they’ll wield.

Engage in an intense arena shooter experience as you battle relentless waves of medieval enemies, enhancing your equipment as you fend off their attacks.

If your current firepower ever seems insufficient, don’t hesitate to call in artillery support or air strikes to obliterate entire armies!

Features:

  • 16 unique soldiers, each with their own special traits.

  • 11 powerful weapons at your disposal.

  • Hundreds of items available for purchase with gold earned between attacks.

  • The power to manipulate the stats of enemies, your squad, and weapon types, depending on which items you acquire.

  • 4 distinct maps.

  • 19 diverse enemy types.

  • Upgradeable squad attributes.

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Turkish
*languages with full audio support
